# Chapter 14 Audit Checklist

The audit checklist provides a sequential list of each step needed to complete the audit day.

## Audit Steps

| Phase | Step | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| **Open Period** | Step 1 | Open the current audit day. |
| | Step 2 | Verify machine changes. Verify machine adds and moves at this time. Machine retires are verified just prior to closing the day. Machine adds that have not had meters downloaded should be deferred to a later date. |
| **Manual Meters** | Step 3 | Enter manual meters. If there are no manual meters to enter, cancel the entry to complete the task. |
| **Correct Meter Variances** | Step 4 | Investigate machine meter variances. Export current meters and calculate deltas, or have the system calculate corrections. |
| | Step 5 | Adjust meters or accept variances. After checking meter variances, adjust any meters that must be adjusted and accept variances that are correct. |
| **Handpays** | Step 6 | Balance jackpots and fills. Balance with actual hand-pay and fill slips by booth to the main cage. |
| | Step 7 | Add any manual hand pays. If there are none, complete the manual hand pay task to mark it as done. |
| | Step 8 | Investigate jackpot, progressive, cancel credit, and bonus jackpot variances. |
| **Voucher Drop** | Step 9 | Import voucher information. Once imported, the Voucher In data reflects machines and voucher drop values. |
| | Step 10 | Balance the total voucher drop to the soft count voucher report. The total number of cash cans dropped should match the number of games dropped. Balance Voucher In to the SC report from EZ Pay. Balance Voucher Out to the Issuance report from EZ Pay. |
| | Step 11 | Investigate problems and variances for voucher drop. Run the Machine Drop Report to check if variances wash from drop to drop. Investigate variances using machine events. Check variances for reasonableness by calculating deltas. Adjust or accept variances as appropriate. |
| | Step 12 | Accept voucher variances. |
| **NCEP Drop** | Step 13 | Import NCEP information. |
| | Step 14 | Investigate problems and variances for NCEP drop. |
| | Step 15 | Accept NCEP variances. |
| **— OR —** | | |
| **CEP Drop** | Step 13 | Import CEP information. |
| | Step 14 | Investigate problems and variances for CEP drop. |
| | Step 15 | Accept CEP variances. |
| **Soft Drop** | Step 16 | Actual soft drop. If there is no soft drop today, select "No Drop Today." |
| | Step 17 | Balance the total soft drop. Match orphan cans to orphan machines. Total cash cans dropped should match games dropped. Balance to the Soft Drop Summary from the Drop Utility. |
| | Step 18 | Investigate variances for soft drop. Run the Machine Drop report. Investigate variances using machine events. Calculate deltas for reasonableness. Adjust or accept as appropriate. |
| | Step 19 | Audit test (optional). Use to test machine's soft meters, including voucher meters, versus system meters. Not required to close the period. |
| | Step 20 | Print the Gaming Meter Audit Report for comparisons. |
| **Close Period** | Step 21 | Verify Machine Changes. Verify machine retires at this time. A machine can be verified if final meters have not been downloaded but a final meter can be chosen. Retires occur at end of audit to ensure final drops, vouchers, and hand pays have been applied. |
| | Step 22 | Print and balance reports (see Recommended Daily Reports). |
| | Step 23 | Compare the Metered Slot Win report, Gaming Metered report, and Machine Drop report. Ensure matching columns agree. Discrepancies could indicate: previous periods still open, voucher drop with no soft drop, soft drop with no voucher drop, incorrect closing configuration, or data changes in a previous month. |
| | Step 24 | Close Period. |
| | Step 25 | Run the Metered Slot Win, Gaming Metered, and Machine Drop reports again to verify numbers after the period is closed. |

## 14.1 Recommended Daily Reports

| Report | Category |
|--------|----------|
| Actual Slot Win | Audit |
| Adjustment | Audit |
| Bill Acceptor Content | Slot Operations |
| Bill Drop Variance | Audit |
| Current Cash on Floor | Audit |
| Drop Discrepancy | Audit |
| Drop Reconciliation | Audit |
| Gaming Metered Report | GCB |
| Gaming Report | GCB |
| Handpay (By fills, jackpots, overrides, and voids) | Audit |
| Handpay for Period | Audit |
| Hard and Soft Drop Variance Summary | Audit |
| Hard Drop Variance | Audit |
| Machine Drop (includes vouchering) | GCB |
| Machines Not Registered | System |
| Meter Verification | Audit |
| Metered Slot Win | Audit |
| Metered Slot Win Lease | Audit |
| Missing W2G | Audit |
| No Drop in a Week | Audit |
| Retiring Machines | Audit |
| Voucher Drop Variance | Audit |
| W2G | Audit |
| W2G Pending | Audit |
| Zero Meters | Slot Operation |
